mapper.sql: select id, user_id, user_name, id_card, gender, nation, birth_date, political_status, college, major, school_ccb_card, native_province, native_city, hukou_province, hukou_city, family_address, height, polo_size, attend_ceremony, assign_province, has_teacher_cert, teacher_subject, project_type, special_type, phone, email, has_cadre_exp, service_province, service_county, service_unit, position, post_code, service_address, contact_person, unit_phone, remark, admit_year, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by from student_admission
mapper.select:
select sa.id, sa.user_id, sa.user_name, sa.id_card, sa.gender, sa.nation, sa.birth_date, sa.political_status, sa.college, sa.major, sa.school_ccb_card, sa.native_province, sa.native_city, sa.hukou_province, sa.hukou_city, sa.family_address, sa.height, sa.polo_size, sa.attend_ceremony, sa.assign_province, sa.has_teacher_cert, sa.teacher_subject, sa.project_type, sa.special_type, sa.phone, sa.email, sa.has_cadre_exp, sa.service_province, sa.service_county, sa.service_unit, sa.position, sa.post_code, sa.service_address, sa.contact_person, sa.unit_phone, sa.remark, sa.admit_year, sa.create_time, sa.create_by, sa.update_time, sa.update_by,
(CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM friend_relation fr WHERE fr.user_id = #{params.currentUserId} AND fr.friend_id = sa.id AND fr.status = '1' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as is_friend,
IFNULL( (SELECT status FROM friend_apply fa WHERE fa.apply_user_id = #{params.currentUserId} AND fa.target_user_id = sa.id ORDER BY fa.create_time DESC LIMIT 1), 0 ) as friend_status
from student_admission sa
and user_id = #{userId} and user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%') and id_card like concat('%', #{idCard}, '%') and gender = #{gender} and nation like concat('%', #{nation}, '%') and birth_date = #{birthDate} and political_status like concat('%', #{politicalStatus}, '%') and college like concat('%', #{college}, '%') and major like concat('%', #{major}, '%') and school_ccb_card like concat('%', #{schoolCcbCard}, '%') and native_province like concat('%', #{nativeProvince}, '%') and native_city like concat('%', #{nativeCity}, '%') and hukou_province like concat('%', #{hukouProvince}, '%') and hukou_city like concat('%', #{hukouCity}, '%') and family_address like concat('%', #{familyAddress}, '%') and height = #{height} and polo_size like concat('%', #{poloSize}, '%') and attend_ceremony = #{attendCeremony} and assign_province like concat('%', #{assignProvince}, '%') and has_teacher_cert = #{hasTeacherCert} and teacher_subject like concat('%', #{teacherSubject}, '%') and project_type like concat('%', #{projectType}, '%') and special_type like concat('%', #{specialType}, '%') and phone like concat('%', #{phone}, '%') and email like concat('%', #{email}, '%') and has_cadre_exp = #{hasCadreExp} and service_province like concat('%', #{serviceProvince}, '%') and service_county like concat('%', #{serviceCounty}, '%') and service_unit like concat('%', #{serviceUnit}, '%') and position like concat('%', #{position}, '%') and post_code like concat('%', #{postCode}, '%') and service_address like concat('%', #{serviceAddress}, '%') and contact_person like concat('%', #{contactPerson}, '%') and unit_phone like concat('%', #{unitPhone}, '%') and admit_year = #{admitYear}
mapper.insert:
insert into student_admission
user_id, user_name, id_card, gender, nation, birth_date, political_status, college, major, school_ccb_card, native_province, native_city, hukou_province, hukou_city, family_address, height, polo_size, attend_ceremony, assign_province, has_teacher_cert, teacher_subject, project_type, special_type, phone, email, has_cadre_exp, service_province, service_county, service_unit, position, post_code, service_address, contact_person, unit_phone, remark, admit_year, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by,
#{userId}, #{userName}, #{idCard}, #{gender}, #{nation}, #{birthDate}, #{politicalStatus}, #{college}, #{major}, #{schoolCcbCard}, #{nativeProvince}, #{nativeCity}, #{hukouProvince}, #{hukouCity}, #{familyAddress}, #{height}, #{poloSize}, #{attendCeremony}, #{assignProvince}, #{hasTeacherCert}, #{teacherSubject}, #{projectType}, #{specialType}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{hasCadreExp}, #{serviceProvince}, #{serviceCounty}, #{serviceUnit}, #{position}, #{postCode}, #{serviceAddress}, #{contactPerson}, #{unitPhone}, #{remark}, #{admitYear}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateTime}, #{updateBy},
mapper.delete:
delete from student_admission where id in
#{id}
